omitted_declarations.policy_reference: Such as your correspondence with us via various channels (such as email, phone number, online chat service, social media, mail, instant chat and our customer service department)

Such as details on the types and specifications of the goods sold and purchased, pricing and delivery information, any dispute records, communications between Buyers and Sellers and any information disclosed in any discussion forum.

Such as information connected with the Platform or goods and/or services purchased via the Platform as such information relates to a complaint, for example, the photographs you upload for the products reviews or complaints.

The personal information that we collect, or have collected in the preceding 12 months, falls into the following categories of personal information, as enumerated by the CCPA: Identifiers, such as your name, postal address, email address, user account name, and IP address; Personal information categories listed in the California Customer Records statute (Cal. Civ. Code § 1798.80(e)), such as your contact information; Commercial information, such as transaction information and purchase history; Internet or network activity information, such as your browsing history and interactions with our Platform; Geolocation data, such as your approximate location; Audio, electronic, visual, and similar information, such as your records of your support requests and interactions with our customer support service; and Inferences drawn from any of the above personal information to create a summary about you, for example of your preferences and characteristics.
Such as a form of ID like a passport or other identity verification for customs clearance purposes or after-sales services.
Such as people or accounts with whom you share content or interact and contact information if you choose to upload or import it from a device (such as an address book).
